New Ideas. Real Impact.

Weli

AI & ML Engineer | Software Developer

Software engineering student. Advanced experience in AI, ML, NLP, computer vision, and audio processing.

Building innovative solutions, pushing boundaries, and shaping the future with real projects.

This is just the beginning. More is on the way.

Clean Code & Architecture

About

A short introduction

I'm Veli — a software engineer who enjoys turning fuzzy problems into well-structured systems and shipping them with care.

Full-stack engineering

TypeScript, Next.js, Node, and a strong feel for system design and data modeling.

Product-minded

I think about users, not just code. Performance, accessibility, and clarity ship together.

Long-term code

I write for the team that inherits it — clean architecture, tested boundaries, no surprises.

More about me →

Projects

Selected work

A handful of recent things I've built. The full list — including write-ups — lives on the projects page.

Remixfy

AI-powered rap lyrics and beat generation platform. Prompt-based music production with FastAPI backend and React frontend.

  • FastAPI
  • React
  • OpenAI API
  • MusicGen
  • PyTorch
  • Stable Audio

ArgusLens

AI-powered visual analysis system. Uses Grounding DINO and Temporal Transformer for contextual object detection and risk prediction.

  • Python
  • Grounding DINO
  • Temporal Transformer
  • Computer Vision
  • PyTorch

AI Health System

End-to-end AI system for automatic plant disease detection from leaf images using YOLOv8 and EfficientNet-B3 with Grad-CAM explainability.

  • FastAPI
  • YOLOv8
  • EfficientNet-B3
  • Grad-CAM
  • Python
  • PyTorch
View all projects →

Have a project in mind?

I'm open to interesting work and collaborations. Drop a line — I usually reply within a day or two.
